[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010000100 2
1 010011000 3
2 101110100 5
3 111001110 6
4 111111001 7
5 111111111 a
6 001100011 4
7 001100100 3

12 111001001 5
